mapper.sql: ISSUE_ID, PROJECT_ID, ISSUE_KEY, ISSUE_TYPE, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, PRIORITY, ASSIGNEE_ID, REPORTER_ID, START_DATE, DUE_DATE, RESOLVED_DATE, ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SPENT_MINUTES, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT

I.ISSUE_ID, I.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.ISSUE_TYPE, I.TITLE, I.DESCRIPTION, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, I.ASSIGNEE_ID, I.REPORTER_ID, I.START_DATE, I.DUE_DATE, I.RESOLVED_DATE, I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, I.SPENT_MINUTES, I.CREATED_AT, I.UPDATED_AT
mapper.update: UPDATE ISSUE SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, ISSUE_KEY = #{issueKey}, ISSUE_TYPE = #{issueType}, TITLE = #{title}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, STATUS = #{status}, PRIORITY = #{priority}, ASSIGNEE_ID = #{assigneeId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, REPORTER_ID = #{reporterId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, DUE_DATE = #{dueDate}, RESOLVED_DATE = #{resolvedDate}, ESTIMATED_MINUTES = #{estimatedMinutes}, SPENT_MINUTES = #{spentMinutes}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ISSUE_ID = #{issueId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ISSUE I INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON I.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE I.ISSUE_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
